meaning: Uniform Resource Citation,统一资源引用
examples: Objective to investigate the clinical significance of URC (Urine-test Rergent for cancer screening and monitoring) and TSGF (Tumor specific Growth Factor) for the diagnosis of cancer.
URC understands that the luxury goods consumer of today no longer makes his buying decision based on product quality alone, but based on the lifestyle connotation and experience associated with it.
